creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: I ran "pkg check -Ba" to look for broken libraries and found none. I ran "portmaster -a" which ran fine until it got to plasma5-kwin. I manually removed and reinstalled QT5 libraries. Nothing worked. I finally just ran "pkg remove -fa" and removed all packages, rebooted, and then compiled x11/kde5 from scratch. Everything -- including plasma5-kwin -- compiled without any problems. This suggests to me that somewhere there was a broken dependency that was missed by the tools I used to troubleshoot. But at this point we may never find out what it was.
